e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The repo now carries a runnable all-life north-star recipe that scores candidate action by the weakest life-good after action, rejects unproven or extractive movement, keeps silence distinct from no, and maps paths by life-good and scale.
test_flows: The north-star recipe returns a stable all-life-vitality-through-sovereign-coherence name.
A low-vitality state chooses vitality and the choices:circulate-life-force path.
The primary levers for health, vitality, and sovereignty are inherited from the integrated living-equation stance.
An action that raises four goods while lowering sovereignty scores 0.
A candidate missing the witnessed proof gate scores 0.
Silence is distinct from no and maps to wait-witness-no-force.
The technology scale maps to ports, health, and reversible choice.
